definition: Unique, stable rule identifier.

definition: Logical rule group.
allowed_values_or_example: Data Validation; Eligibility; Device Validation; Coverage; Coverage Limit; Exclusion; Anomaly; Evidence; Outcome

definition: Evaluation priority: lower values are evaluated first within applicable rule groups.

Claim category to which rule applies; ALL means every supported category.

allowed_values_or_example: A unique policy record has been found.

definition: Inputs required by the rule.
Condition that satisfies the rule.
Condition that triggers the rule outcome.
Required safe handling of missing/uncertain input.
allowed_values_or_example: Request incident date; do not infer

definition: Disposition triggered when the failure condition is met.
Structured review reason when outcome_on_failure is MANUAL_REVIEW.
Traceable business policy / rules reference code.
Operational criticality of the rule.
Business explanation for why the rule exists.
allowed_values_or_example: Coverage cannot be assessed without valid configuration.

definition: Semantic version of the rule definition.
Date on which rule version becomes active.
End date if superseded; blank when open-ended.
Whether the rule is active for evaluation.
